raw_consumer_statement: In XXXX of 2024 someone opened a XXXX XXXX citibank card at a home depo using my identity. The purchased about XXXX dollars worth of merchandise. I did not make this purchase and did not give anyone permission to use my information. I found out about the theft when a bill was delivered to my home. I immediately disputed it over the phone. I have also sent Citibank my police report, FTC affidavit and a letter describing the fraud. The are still holding me responsible and reporting it to the credit reporting agencies.
